assignments.tastingNotes: Pine resin, grapefruit zest, dry finish.

assignments.tastingNotes: Cracker malt, herbal hop snap, clean bitterness.

assignments.tastingNotes: Lemon peel, floral hops, bright finish.

assignments.tastingNotes: Tart cherry, light funk, dry finish.
